name: Baked Black Pot Jambalaya
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Meat (chicken, shrimp, oysters, crawfish, or sausage)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 5-quart cast iron Dutch oven, mix rice and melted margarine together thoroughly, coating all rice.
2. Heat vegetable cooking oil in a 12-inch heavy aluminum skillet over high heat. Sauté onions, bell pepper, and garlic until they start to brown.
3. Add meat (chicken, shrimp, oysters, crawfish, or sausage) and fry with seasonings.
4. Mix meats and sautéed vegetables into the raw rice. Toss in remaining ingredients, excluding green onions and parsley.
5. Pour melted butter over everything and stir until well blended.
6. Cover Dutch oven tightly and bake at 375°F for 45 minutes.
7. Add green onions and parsley, stirring to mix all ingredients. Cover pot and continue baking another 15 minutes or until rice is tender and flaky.
